title.en: The Seven Star God will be with a Heavenly Mona...

content.en:
"Who is it, who is it ????"

The Burning Sun Heavenly Monarch and the White Eagle Heavenly Monarch were extremely furious.

During this time, the Heavenly Fire Sect suffered heavy losses, more than a dozen Heavenly Monarchs fell, and many Divine Generals also fell, and even one of the Seven-Star Divine Generals was also affected.

The Seven Star God will be with a Heavenly Monarch and be assassinated together.

Of course, the fall of more than a dozen Heavenly Monarchs was only a small part of the entire Heavenly Fire Sect, but the negative impact was too great.

Now, many Heavenly Monarchs didn't dare to be alone at all, and even hid in the headquarters, and the Heavenly Fire Sect's control over the surrounding territory instantly dropped by several notches.

What's more, some of the vassal forces that surrendered to the Heavenly Fire Sect saw the situation of the Heavenly Fire Sect and were ready to take refuge in other forces one by one, which was the biggest loss for the Heavenly Fire Sect.

The top level of the Heavenly Fire Sect also relied heavily on those vassal forces, after all, finding resources, collecting resources, and operating some industries all needed the help of these vassal forces, if they only relied on the Heavenly Fire Sect, where would there be so many manpower to manage such a huge territory.

But now, the people of the Heavenly Fire Sect are panicking, once this matter cannot be resolved, let alone expanding, I am afraid that there will be no way to even go out at the door of the house.

In the past, they could have deduced the identity of the enemy, but now they can't do it at all, so they don't know who the enemy is.

As time passed, the assassination of the Heavenly Monarchs of the Heavenly Fire Sect happened one after another, and most of the Heavenly Monarchs who came back from outside were assassinated.

Not long after, all the Heavenly Monarchs of the Heavenly Fire Sect retreated to the headquarters of the Heavenly Fire Sect.

And the other Heavenly Monarchs scattered all over the Great Universe, who dared to come back, were basically dead, and the other Heavenly Monarchs hid and didn't dare to come back at all.

In short, the Heavenly Fire Sect was scared of being killed.

Meanwhile.

Some forces that were not at odds with the Heavenly Fire Sect began to encroach on the territory of the Heavenly Fire Sect, as well as some mineral veins and treasure lands, and the Heavenly Fire Sect did not dare to send the Heavenly Monarchs out at all, not even the Burning Sun Heavenly Monarch and the White Eagle Heavenly Monarch did not dare to come out.

They were afraid that if they came out, the enemy would attack the headquarters of the Heavenly Fire Sect, in that case, there would be more dead Heavenly Monarchs, and the foundation of the Heavenly Fire Sect in the Great Universe would be completely finished.

So, they held back.

The Heavenly Fire Sect's forbearance, other forces became even more arrogant, and in just one year, they swallowed up ninety percent of the territory of the Heavenly Fire Sect, and the Heavenly Fire Sect's divine generals and earth lords suffered countless casualties.

All of a sudden, the Heavenly Fire Sect could no longer maintain the reputation of a great force, and was reduced to a medium force, and it was also a force that did not dare to step out of the sect's headquarters.

this day.

The Burning Sun Heavenly Monarch took the initiative to contact the Dark God Society, and it was to contact the Dark God Society with his real identity, and the Dark God Society arranged for the Black Tower Heavenly Monarch to contact the Burning Sun Heavenly Monarch.

"Black Tower Heavenly Monarch, we want to know who is targeting the Heavenly Fire Sect, if we find out, our Heavenly Fire Sect is willing to pay a huge price!"

"It's hard to find out!" "The Black Tower Heavenly Monarch said: "It's different from before, the ten True Ancestors of our Dark God Temple have used the Dark Dao Stone to block the Great Universe, not to mention us little minions of the Heavenly Destiny Realm, even if it is the Dao Ancestor himself, it is difficult to calculate the identity of the enemy!"

"What can the Dark God do to help our Heavenly Fire Sect?"

The Burning Sun Heavenly Monarch asked.

"Hahaha, why does the Dark God Society want to help the Heavenly Fire Sect? This is not good for us! And in such a situation as your Heavenly Fire Sect, I'm afraid it will be difficult to give us enough benefits, right?"

"Don't worry, our Tianhuo Sect still has the foundation, besides, your Dark God Society can be described as a street rat in the Great Universe! Not to mention that many forces are secretly cooperating with you, but that is only secretly cooperating, on the surface, if they know your location, they will definitely kill you. But if the Dark God will help us the Heavenly Fire Sect, and the Heavenly Fire Sect is willing to become an ally of your Dark God Society, and even willing to help you deal with any forces, how about it?"

"Really?"

The Black Tower Heavenly Monarch asked.

The Heavenly Fire Sect is willing to help them with the Dark God Society, this is not a trivial matter, if the matter is leaked, the Heavenly Fire Sect will definitely be crusaded, and it will be truly finished.

"Really, but only to the Heavenly Fire Sect of the Great Universe!" the Burning Sun Heavenly Monarch said.

"Yes, the Dark God will be willing to help you Tianhuo Sect, but some expenses still want to be paid. Heita Tianjun said.

Subsequently, the Burning Sun Heavenly Monarch and the Black Tower Heavenly Monarch discussed the matter of cooperation.

"How will the Dark Gods help us?"

The Burning Sun Heavenly Monarch asked.

The Black Tower Heavenly Monarch smiled: "Your Heavenly Fire Sect should have been targeted by a Heavenly Monarch, this Heavenly Monarch is good at concealing assassination, and has used a supernatural power such as exploration, it is very difficult to find this kind of Heavenly Monarch." However, our Dark God Society is good at spatial abilities, and almost every member of the Dark God Society has cultivated a spatial supernatural ability, and one of the Heavenly Monarchs of our Dark God Society has practiced the spatial chaos supernatural ability - Great Realm Shift, and has the chaotic supernatural ability to instantly move in different worlds. The Heavenly Monarchs of the Heavenly Fire Sect can carry a small world and leave the coordinates, once something happens, our Heavenly Monarch will instantly move over, in the big universe, no matter in cooperation, they can move instantly, regardless of the distance. "

"The Great Realm Shifts, the Dark God Society actually has this Chaos Divine Power, I heard that this Chaos Divine Power is not broken, and the only version is also a mutilated Divine Power, and it can't be cultivated!"

"Hahaha, your low level is naturally not clear, the outside world has cut off the inheritance, but the Dark God Society has the inheritance. Because an ancient true ancestor of the Dark God Temple would be able to move the Great Realm Divine Power, and in the distant era, it was even ranked among the top 100, and at that time it was still called the Great Realm Shifting Technique. Although it is only ranked 133rd now, it is enough to prove the power of this chaotic supernatural power. The True Ancestor of our Dark God Temple had already cultivated this Chaos Divine Power to the Consummation Realm, so he could naturally create the inheritance of this Chaos Divine Power. The Black Tower Heavenly Monarch explained.

This is not a secret, many of the big forces in the chaos are clear, but the people who understand it are basically powerful True Monarchs and True Ancestors, and it is normal for the Burning Sun Heavenly Monarch not to know.

"But once that enemy makes a move, our Heavenly Fire Sect's Heavenly Monarch will definitely die, even if the Heavenly Monarch of your Dark God Society moves over, it will be too late!"

"Losing a Heavenly Monarch in exchange for the enemy's life, the Burning Sun Heavenly Monarch is reluctant, you must know that your Heavenly Fire Sect has lost a lot of Heavenly Monarchs during this time, and you don't care about one less!"

"Okay, I promise!"

The Burning Sun Heavenly Monarch replied.
